data.content: Tightened ReTakes row width constraints so long beat titles cannot widen the document and shift the centered header. Added min-w-0/flex-1 truncation on RetakeRowTitle and a regression test in src/lib/__tests__/retake-row-layout.test.ts. Verified with bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build in the foolery-44f1 worktree.
